structured_payload_candidate.title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control in Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Heating, fan speed and SAT setpoint are controlled based on heating-loop signal ranges.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating and there is a heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: For heating-loop signal 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed; for 50% to 0%, FANsp is MinHeatSpeed. For heating-loop signal 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT; for 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to active zone heating setpoint. The heating coil is modulated with a PID loop to maintain discharge temperature at SATsp. Cooling coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If there is a heating coil, when Zone State is Heating 1. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, FANsp is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinHeatSpeed. 2. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, FANsp is MinHeatSpeed. 3. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT. 4. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the active zone heating setpoint. 5. The heating coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Cooling coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Deadband, fan speed is set to DeadbandSpeed (or fan off if zero), and both coils are OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off. Cooling coil OFF. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. When Zone State is Deadband 1. FANsp shall be DeadbandSpeed. If DeadbandSpeed is zero, shut the fan off. 2. Cooling coil OFF 3. Heating coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control in Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with cooling coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is Cooling, fan speed and SAT setpoint are controlled based on cooling-loop signal ranges.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Cooling and there is a cooling coil
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: For cooling-loop signal 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed; for 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. For cooling-loop signal 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from active zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT; for 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT. The cooling coil is modulated with a PID loop to maintain discharge temperature at SATsp. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If there is a cooling coil, when Zone State is Cooling 1. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed. 2. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. 3. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT. 4. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT. 5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Heating coil OFF

evidence_quote: c. If there is a cooling coil, when Zone State is Cooling 1. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed. 2. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. 3. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT. 4. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT. 5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Heating coil OFF
evidence_text: c. If there is a cooling coil, when Zone State is Cooling 1. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed. 2. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. 3. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT. 4. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT. 5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Heating coil OFF

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Operating State Definition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The OS of each FCU is defined by commanded positions of heating and cooling valves per Table 5.20.6.2.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Define OS as per Table 5.20.6.2: OS#1 (Heating) when heating valve >0 and cooling valve =0; OS#2 (No Heating or Cooling) when both =0; OS#3 (Cooling) when heating =0 and cooling >0; OS#4 (Unknown) otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The OS of each FCU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating-coil control valve and cooling-coil control valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2 and Figure 5.20.6.2.

evidence_quote: The OS of each FCU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating-coil control valve and cooling-coil control valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2 and Figure 5.20.6.2.
evidence_text: The OS of each FCU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating-coil control valve and cooling-coil control valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2 and Figure 5.20.6.2.

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Required Points
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The following points must be available to AFDD routines: SAT, RAT (if present), SATsp, HC, CC, FS.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide SAT, RAT (if present), SATsp, HC (heating-coil valve position command 0-100%), CC (cooling-coil valve position command 0-100%), FS (fan-speed command 0-100%).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The following points must be available to the AFDD routines for each FCU: a. SAT = supply air temperature b. RAT = return air temperature (if present) c. SATsp = supply air temperature setpoint d. HC = heating-coil valve position command; 0% ≤ HC ≤ 100% e. CC = cooling-coil valve position command; 0% ≤ CC ≤ 100% f. FS = fan-speed command; 0% ≤ FS ≤ 100%

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Rolling Averages Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Five-minute rolling averages with 1-minute sampling of SAT, RAT, and number of OS changes in previous 60 minutes must be continuously calculated.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate five-minute rolling averages with 1-minute sampling of SAT_avg, RAT_avg (if fitted), and ΔOS (number of changes in OS during previous 60 minutes). Operator shall have ability to adjust averaging window and sampling period for each point independently.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The following values must be continuously calculated by the AFDD routines for each FCU: a. Five-minute rolling averages with 1-minute sampling of the following point values; operator shall have the ability to adjust the averaging window and sampling period for each point independently. 1. SAT avg = rolling average of supply air temperature 2. RAT avg = rolling average of return air temperature (if fitted) 3. ΔOS = number of changes in OS during the previous 60 minutes (moving window)

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Fault Condition Evaluation by OS
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Subset of fault conditions evaluated depends on OS: OS#1 evaluates FC#1 and FC#2; OS#2 evaluates FC#5 (heating only) or FC#4 (cooling only); OS#3 evaluates FC#1 and FC#3; OS#4 evaluates FC#1.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Evaluate specified fault conditions per OS.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. In OS#1 (Heating), the following fault conditions shall be evaluated: 1. FC#1: Too many changes in OS 2. FC#2: SAT too low in full heating b. In OS#2 (Deadband), the following fault conditions shall be evaluated: 1. FC#5: Temperature drop across inactive heating coil (heating only FCU 2. FC#4: Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil (cooling only FCU c. In OS#3 (Cooling), the following fault conditions shall be evaluated: 1. FC#1: Too many changes in OS 2. FC#3: SAT too high in full cooling d. In OS#4 (other), the following fault conditions shall be evaluated: 1. FC#1: Too many changes in OS

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chilled-Water Reset Requests Logic
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with chilled-water coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send reset requests based on SAT deviation and CHW valve position.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If SAT > setpoint by 10°F for 5 min, send 3 requests; else if SAT > setpoint by 5°F for 5 min, send 2 requests; else if CHW valve >95%, send 1 request until <85%; else send 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the supply air temperature is 10°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 3 requests, c. Else if the supply air temperature is 5°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 2 requests, d. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. e. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: b. If the supply air temperature is 10°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 3 requests, c. Else if the supply air temperature is 5°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 2 requests, d. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. e. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text: b. If the supply air temperature is 10°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 3 requests, c. Else if the supply air temperature is 5°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 2 requests, d. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. e. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with chilled-water coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send chiller plant request if CHW valve >95% until <10%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 1 request until CHW valve position <10%; else send 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 10%. b. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote: a. If the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 10%. b. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hot-Water Reset Requests Logic
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with hot-water coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send reset requests based on SAT deviation and HW valve position.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If SAT < SATsp by 30°F for 5 min, send 3 requests; else if SAT < SATsp by 15°F for 5 min, send 2 requests; else if HW valve >95%, send 1 request until <85%; else send 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the supply air temperature is 17°C (30°F) less than SATsp for 5 minutes, send 3 requests. c. Else if the supply air temperature is 8°C (15°F) less than SATsp for 5 minutes, send 2 requests. d. Else if HW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less than 85%. e. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Hot-Water Plant Requests Logic
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with hot-water coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send heating plant request if HW valve >95% until <10%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 1 request until HW valve position <10%; else send 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the HW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less than 10%. b. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
